_comment: IAGA Sentinel gate registered as a Codex PreToolUse hook.
Format confirmed against codex-cli 0.138.0-alpha.7: Codex's hook engine
is Claude-Code-compatible (it migrates hooks from .claude) and reads this
schema. Codex pipes the pending-tool-call event (JSON) to the command's
stdin; the gate exits 0 (allow) or 2 (block) with the justification on
stdout. Replace the absolute path with your built binary
matcher is a regex over tool names; ".*" gates every tool.
